textContent:
Last year, seeing all the people posting their sablay pictures made me feel bad and so insecure about myself. Pero, I remembered that I have family, blood or not, to fall back on. To not let me compare my struggles to the achievements of others. I wanna say thank you sa lahat ng taong nakasama ko, online or offline. Salamat:

- sa mga kasama ko sa CS lib, Adam, Ice, Geuel, Allen, Marco, Yel, Coma, Mark, Deanna, atbp. Thank you for giving me the opportunity to yap everyday. Naalala ko pa rin yung Xmas party sa discord, sayang nga lang di naulit. Lalo na kay Adam na halos araw-araw kong inaaya maski pasko kasama ko pa rin sa discord, nagluluto ng spaghetti para sa noche buena, salamat.

- kina Ice, Marco, Nicole, Yel, at Vince, sa lagi't-laging pando-dogshow sakin pag magkakasama tayo eme. Pero no, I do appreciate the company you guys provide, sana makapag-lunch ulit tayo SHSHSH. Lalo na kay Ice na lagi akong pinapagalitan just to set my life straight, salamat.

- kina Marivi, Meiko, Sinead, Adiel, Joshua, Aaliyah, sa abyss streams at sa pull streams sa genshin, sa pagse-send ng memes. Pero salamat na hindi lang hanggang genshin camaraderie natin, hanggang personal na buhay din, sa mga problema ko, and other shit. Kay Marivi, na minsan nun araw-araw ko nang inaaya, just to talk about irrelevant shit, salamat.

- kina: Bea, Ram, Grey, Jessa at sa buong SaLin, from linguistic stuff to old plain chika. Thank you so mu- no really, kayo escape ko from physics, pag ayoko na mag-math SHSHSH. Sana makapagchikahan pa tayo sa SaLin meetup.

- kina Adiel, Ram, Grey, at Gabe, sa gabi-gabing ayaan ng lunch to just talking shit about people or just talking shit in general, lagi kong iche-cherish yun kahit super simple lang. Also thank you for making me realize how big of a mistake I did, and letting me correct it. Iykyk.

- kina Rose, Yap, Daisy, Queenie, at Arvel, na kahit minsan ko lang nakikita ay parang wala lang din nagbago sa pakikipag-usap at halubilo. Sana mas makapag-hangout pa tayo sometime!

- lastly, kina mama at papa, for always supporting me, and not pressuring me when my laude status was shaky. 

Kung di ka man na-mention, don't worry, as long as we've interacted, even how short, you've affected my life for the better. 

Thank you for helping me cope and be happy, from pandemic until now. 



Michael Adrian Javier
2019-0****
BS Physics
GWA: 1.203
